bundle.shortDescription: stavR Governor — supervises the stavR daemon
bundle.longDescription: Tray companion for the stavR personal MCP gateway. Auto-restarts the daemon on crash with exponential backoff, surfaces health state via the tray icon, and renders OS-level toast notifications. As of Phase 4 of family-mode-phase-2, the installer carries the stavR daemon itself as a Tauri externalBin sidecar — one signed installer per OS is a complete stavR.
